commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation --show-labels 2>&1 | grep uccl'
echo === get all pods any status ===
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation -o wide 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation uccl-ep-upstream-launcher-7v7w6 --tail=200 2>&1 > /tmp/s2.log; wc -l /tmp/s2.log; grep -i -E "ALL PASSED|NON-DETERMINISM|PASSED|FAILED|Traceback|Error:|dispatch|combine|hash_details" /tmp/s2.log | head -40'
